programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates steps into the past to examine unsolved mysteries; featuring the alleged alien abduction of Travis Walton, the bizarre death of American hero Charles Lindbergh's son, and the invisible attacks visited upon CIA operatives in Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh examines clues left by the Zodiac Killer, the location of Forrest Fenn's million-dollar buried treasure, and the Voynich Manuscript.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A new study suggests the Shroud of Turin may be authentic, while researchers analyze old ghost photos with new tools; the creator of the Georgia Guidestones is identified.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the alleged curse behind King Tut's tomb explorers' deaths, the Dyatlov Pass incident where 9 hikers died mysteriously and an influencer's disappearance in Nevada desert, investigating potential supernatural links.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Was the Hindenburg truly destroyed by accident or by sabotage?; could the famous Patterson-Gimlin Bigfoot footage hold clues that only modern analysis can define?; what really happened when 50,000 Persian soldiers disappeared without a trace in 524 B.C.?

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates reopens cases where the truth stayed buried -- he exposes new clues, shaken alibis, and explosive revelations that challenge everything that we thought we knew about Noah's Ark, the terror of anthrax attacks, and Bugsy Siegel's murder.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: A failed assassination unleashes claims of a mind-controlled gunman; Andrew investigates the CIA's legacy of MK-Ultra, and stages a shocking experiment with mentalist Max Major to test whether a person really can be hypnotized into becoming an assassin.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates three aquatic mysteries: the Kraken, Lake Lanier and Atlantis. From terrifying sailor lore, to a deadly lake's dark past, and a lost city beneath the sea, he searches for evidence behind legends shaped by fear, myth and history.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew investigates:what really happened to Jeffrey Epstein? Byreconstructing the crime scene using insider insights, expert analysis, and a fullreplica ofhisjail cell,he tests whether the evidence points to suicide, murder ... or something darker.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates three aquatic mysteries: the Kraken, Lake Lanier and Atlantis. From terrifying sailor lore, to a deadly lake's dark past, and a lost city beneath the sea, he searches for evidence behind legends shaped by fear, myth and history.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew investigates:what really happened to Jeffrey Epstein? Byreconstructing the crime scene using insider insights, expert analysis, and a fullreplica ofhisjail cell,he tests whether the evidence points to suicide, murder ... or something darker.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programme.desc: A gambler wagers his life savings on a single spin of the roulette wheel; a charismatic crook makes money by any means necessary; a pool hustler's life is on the line after being set up and robbed at gunpoint.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Fred opens the door to a new site that he and Dustin have dreamed about for over a decade; after a bust-up with Fred, Kayla makes a discovery that will change the course of their entire season.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: The team dives into "Hell's Kitchen" to test two potential kitchen catastrophes and myths involving grease fires and water; the build team tries to blow up C4 in a microwave and use cheese in a cannon.

programme.desc: Mike learns to be a specialty fireworks technician, then checks out a cow with a hole in its stomach at Arkansas State University.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: Mike trains as a trauma surgeon, learning under simulated battlefield conditions; Mike helps to control iguanas on the Florida coast.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: Mike Rowe goes to the mountains in Utah and gives a dam to a couple nuisance beavers causing havoc for municipalities; Mike gets a little sticky while working with a special effects artist at a glue factory in LA.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: Mike works his hardest construction job yet; he helps a team of rodbusters, who carry 2 tons of reinforced steel each for overpass construction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: Mike sucks rocks off an industrial roof with a massive vacuum; then, he travels to the Black Hills to carve one of the largest monuments in the world: Crazy Horse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: Mike visits a jelly bean company to create a flavored jelly bean based on the smell of his boots; he then travels to Maine to harvest blueberries, before joining in a pie bakeoff.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: Determined to mine a daunting 1,000 ounces of gold this year, Todd Hoffman brings a hand-picked wash plant and all-star crew to his remote Alaskan claim; when they struggle out of the gate, his son Hunter has a bold fix to run his own plant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Fred celebrates his 78th birthday the only way he knows how -- diving for gold; a deadly widow maker threatens to end it all; Kayla's crew is on a hot streak, but their luck runs out as tensions between crew members reach a boiling point.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In treacherous western waters, Sig and Jake gamble on a daring new fishing strategy; Rick and Sophia attempt a perilous boat-to-boat transfer to save a quarter of a million dollars of crab; the fleet mourns the loss of beloved fisherman Nick Mavar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Johnathan's dash to the dock halts as the Coast Guard boards the Time Bandit; Sig seeks a bigger biomass out west and convinces Rick to go to Adak to dig up his father's lost fishing spots; the Hillstrands attempt a high-risk harbor entry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig must act quickly as heavy ice entombs the Northwestern; when Keith's Australian greenhorn challenges his old-school command, a culture clash erupts; hellbent on earning an ownership stake in the Titan, Jake hauls pots at a blistering pace.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A cracked tank on the Titan Explorer leaves Jake's engines vulnerable to seawater; Keith fires another deckhand but struggles to get rid of him for good; Johnathan prescribes alternative cures as the norovirus overtakes the Time Bandit crew at sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: After losing his job, Fred Dickinson enlists the help of Freddy and Juan to rescue his homemade operation, tap into one of Arizona's richest gold veins and provide for his young family of seven.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Two miners in MT desperately need to double their gold after a disastrous start to the season; battling a personal crisis, Juan rejoins Freddy as they follow signs of old mining tunnels and use new technology to uncover ancient river channel gold.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: After buying a wildfire-ravaged mine in British Columbia, a family relying on a greenhorn crew while other members work second jobs sends out an SOS to Freddy and Juan to fix the broken equipment and find gold before it turns to ash.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Hoping to right the mining mistakes of his father, a rookie Idaho miner closes his failing 30-year-old auto business to chase gold in the remote Idaho Hills.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Rick's shaken by his find at the bottom of Valhalla; Tony bears down on his 6,500-ounce goal; Parker taps Brennan for a big job at the Golden Mile.
